final:
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input [7:0] obf_a,
  input [7:0] b,
  input en,
  output reg [7:0] out
);always @(posedge clk, negedge reset) begin
  if (!reset) begin
    out <= 8'b0;
  end else begin
    if (en) begin
      if (obf_a != 8'b0) begin
        out <= obf_a;
      end else begin
        out <= b;
      end
    end else begin
      out <= 8'b0;
    end
  end
end

endmodule
